# Platanus Hack 26 — LATAM Tour

> The best hackathon in Latin America. From zero to product in 36 hours with the top hackers in the region. 2026 edition is a LATAM-wide tour with stops in Argentina, México, Colombia, Venezuela, and Chile. Organized by Platanus, a LATAM startup accelerator.

## Pages

- [Tour overview (home)](https://hack.platan.us/index.md): All five tour stops, dates, sponsors, history.
- [Buenos Aires stop](https://hack.platan.us/26-ar.md): First stop of the 2026 tour. 100 hackers, 36 hours, 8–10 May 2026. Prizes, format, deadlines, how to apply.

## Tour stops

- Buenos Aires, Argentina — 8–10 May 2026 — applications open
- Ciudad de México, México — 19–21 June 2026
- Bogotá, Colombia — 11–13 September 2026
- Caracas, Venezuela — 23–25 October 2026
- Santiago, Chile — 20–22 November 2026

## Optional

- [Apply to Buenos Aires](https://hack.platan.us/26-ar/apply)
- [Become a sponsor](https://hack.platan.us/tour/sponsor)
- [Platanus (the accelerator)](https://platan.us)
